subcodes.first_line: O Jinab-i-Aqa-Muhammad! Upon thee be the glory of God and His praise in the realm of earthly dominion and the Kingdom. I beseech God that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب آقا محمد علیک بهاء الله و ثنائه فی الملک و الملکوت اسئل الله ان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
